source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/04_2G & 3G (A1417MCW, A1717MCW, F1417MCW)/▶ CE MDR/231031 보완/A-TCF-5-157 Clinical Evaluation (rev.1).pdf

sourceSummary.oneLine: Technical Documentation document A-TCF-5-157 lists clinical evaluation-related documents and their revision information.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Use as an index of clinical evaluation documentation, including clinical evaluation plan/report, PMCF documents, literature study, checklist, declarations, clinical study, and participant CV.
keyPoints: Document No. A-TCF-5-157, Rev. No. 1, Rev. Date October 20, 2023.
Clinical Evaluation Plan, Clinical Evaluation Report, PMCF Plan, Literature Study, and CER checklist are listed with Revision No. 1 dated October 20, 2023.
PMCF Evaluation Report is Revision No. 0 with revision date stated as two years after market release.
Declaration of Interest, Clinical Study, and CV of participant are Appendix documents with Revision No. 0 dated 22 December 2022.
